items.title: Signal Network — Genesis
items.content_text:
# The Signal Network — what I've been building

I've spent the last few months designing and building a private AI infrastructure I call the **Signal Network**. This is the first public entry documenting its existence and my authorship of it.

## What it is

A 22-agent mesh spanning my companies:

- **KULN** — streetwear brand (editorial minimalism, Shopify, drop pipeline)
- **LIMBO** — fan community (3,851 verified members, Discord ecosystem, subscription)
- **1Z Entertainment** — self-managed
